promotion_guardrail: Proposal-side only. Do not treat this reduction as active runtime authority, as proof that the embedded snapshot is equivalent to the full parent run, or as permission to promote README replay notes, hash stability, duplicated packet carriage, or runtime-path evidence references into active A2 law from this batch alone.

selection_basis.queue_reason: Selected because the parent run child is now complete and explicitly hands off next descent to the first progress bundle before the v2 sibling.
selection_basis.parent_reason: The parent already isolates the needed bounded seam: a replay/export kit with README replay notes, a narrow embedded one-step snapshot, duplicated carried strategy packets, selective event history, zeroed top-line park/reject totals that still sit over failure residue, and explicit sim-evidence omission.
selection_basis.comparison_anchor_reason: The parent-run child was used to preserve the parent-to-derived bundle relationship, the migrated-run-root child was used to keep this bundle below archive demotion and descendant handoff discipline, and the v2 sibling summary was used to keep the next-step handoff aimed at the patched continuation revision rather than at ad hoc re-entry elsewhere.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Deferred because the first progress-bundle revision needs its own A2-mid child before sibling-to-sibling revision comparison becomes the next bounded step.
Deferred because that parent already has a completed A2-mid child and now serves as comparison support rather than the current primary target.
Deferred because the run-root handoff child is complete and now functions as upstream comparison support only.

raw_source_reread_reason: The parent first-pass source map, distillates, tensions, and candidate summary already isolate the least noisy packets: replay/export-kit status, cumulative README versus embedded final snapshot, duplicated strategy carriage versus selective event trace, failure residue under zeroed top-line counts, missing sim evidence bodies, and the explicit next-step handoff to the v2 sibling.

candidate_items.name: PROGRESS_BUNDLE_IS_REPLAY_EXPORT_KIT_NOT_MINI_PARENT_RUN
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the bundle as a replay/export surface rather than as a small equivalent copy of the full parent run.

candidate_items.name: README_CUMULATIVE_REPLAY_NARRATIVE_AND_EMBEDDED_FINAL_SNAPSHOT_PRESERVE_DIFFERENT_TRUTHS
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the non-interchangeable split between cumulative README totals and the one-step embedded final snapshot that shares the same final hash.

candidate_items.name: DUPLICATE_STRATEGY_CARRIAGE_IS_BROADER_THAN_THE_SHORT_EMBEDDED_EVENT_TRACE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves that seven strategy packets are carried externally and as consumed residue while the short event ledger references only five of them.

candidate_items.name: EMBEDDED_STATE_RETAINS_FAILURE_RESIDUE_BENEATH_ZEROED_TOPLINE_PARK_AND_REJECT_COUNTS
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves that the embedded state still contains kill, park, and reject residue even though summary and soak surfaces present a zeroed parked and rejected top line.

candidate_items.name: HASH_STABLE_END_STATE_AND_REPLAY_REFERENCES_SURVIVE_MORE_CLEANLY_THAN_GOVERNING_CONTEXT_OR_EVIDENCE_BODIES
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the joint contradiction that final hash stability survives across README, summary, state, and sidecar while governing identifiers stay empty and sim evidence bodies are absent.

candidate_items.name: NEXT_DESCENT_SHOULD_COMPARE_THIS_EXPORT_TO_PROGRESS_BUNDLE_V2
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the parent's explicit next-step rule that the cleanest bounded follow-on is the v2 progress-bundle sibling revision.

quarantined_items.name: EMBEDDED_SNAPSHOT_AS_EQUIVALENT_TO_THE_FULL_PARENT_RUN
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The bundle is a replay/export kit with a narrow embedded snapshot, not a full parent-run substitute.

quarantined_items.name: README_CUMULATIVE_TOTALS_AND_EMBEDDED_SUMMARY_TOTALS_AS_INTERCHANGEABLE
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent explicitly preserves cumulative replay narrative and one-step snapshot totals as different views.

quarantined_items.name: DUPLICATED_CARRIED_STRATEGY_PACKETS_AS_PROOF_OF_FULL_EXECUTED_HISTORY
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: Carried packet duplication is broader than the short event ledger the bundle actually retains.

quarantined_items.name: ZERO_PARKED_AND_REJECTED_TOPLINE_COUNTS_AS_FAILURE_FREE_REPLAY
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The embedded state body still preserves kills, parked survivors, and reject-log residue.

quarantined_items.name: SIM_PATH_REFERENCES_AS_PROOF_THAT_SIM_EVIDENCE_BODIES_WERE_RETAINED
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The bundle keeps sim path references while omitting any retained sim subtree.

quarantined_items.name: HASH_STABILITY_AS_FULL_GOVERNING_CONTEXT_OR_FINAL_REPLAY_AUTHORITY
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The end-state hash is stable, but governing identifiers remain empty and the bundle is still a compressed replay export.

reasons_for_candidate_status: These candidates preserve the least noisy reusable packets in the parent: replay/export-kit demotion, README versus embedded snapshot split, duplicate strategy carriage versus short event trace, failure residue under zeroed top lines, stable hash with weak context and missing evidence bodies, and the handoff to the v2 sibling.
They remain archive-linked, contradiction-preserving, and explicitly below active runtime, mini-parent equivalence, and replay-success authority.
reasons_for_quarantine_status: These items remain snapshot-equivalence overread, cumulative-versus-snapshot collapse, packet-carriage overread, failure-free overread, evidence-retention overread, or hash-as-full-authority overread rather than clean A2-2 packets.
The parent is strong enough to preserve them explicitly, but not to promote them into active law.
